name: missing_python_dependency
message: Python module '{module_name}' is missing from the environment.
suggested_fix: Add '{package_name}' to requirements.txt and rerun the workflow.

name: missing_environment_variable
message: Environment variable '{env_name}' was not available during the workflow.
suggested_fix: Define '{env_name}' in the workflow template or provide a safe default.

name: missing_system_tool
message: System command '{command_name}' is missing from the container.
suggested_fix: Install the package that provides '{command_name}' before running the workflow.

name: docker_permission_denied
pattern: permission denied while trying to connect to the Docker daemon socket|Got permission denied while trying to connect to the Docker daemon|/var/run/docker\.sock.*permission denied
message: The application could not access the Docker daemon because of a permissions issue.
suggested_fix: Check Docker group membership, socket permissions, or run the backend in an environment with Docker access.

name: docker_daemon_unavailable
pattern: Cannot connect to the Docker daemon|Is the docker daemon running|docker daemon is not running
message: The Docker daemon was not reachable.
suggested_fix: Start Docker and confirm the current user can run 'docker ps' before rerunning the workflow.

name: docker_image_pull_failure
pattern: failed to resolve source metadata|pull access denied|manifest for .* not found|network timeout
message: Docker could not fetch or resolve an image needed for the build.
suggested_fix: Check the base image tag, registry access and network connectivity.

name: test_failure
message: The workflow ran, but one or more functional tests failed.
suggested_fix: Inspect the failing assertion and compare expected behaviour with the implementation.
